overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a hooded character with a shield walking through a nighttime marsh environment with lily pads, transitioning to a sandy shore with a beached boat under moonlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: lily pad covered marsh with palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through dense lily pads and shallow marsh water

entered.detail: large green lily pads covering the water surface with white and pink flowers
tall palm trees lining the marsh edges against the night sky
rocky cliff formations visible on the horizon

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dense marsh environment at night, surrounded by lily pads and palm trees. The water is shallow and the vegetation is thick, with distant cliffs visible on the horizon under a dark sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: reed beds at the water's edge transitioning to shore

events.description: ground surface transitions from water to muddy sand as character approaches shore
wooden boat comes into view beached on the sandy shore ahead

agents.ego_description: moving through tall reeds toward the sandy shoreline where a boat is visible

entered.detail: sandy and muddy ground at the water's edge
traditional wooden boat beached on the shore
tall reed grasses growing in the shallow water

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the lily pad marsh into reed beds as the ground becomes sandy. A wooden boat becomes visible on the shore ahead, and the environment opens up toward the water's edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy riverbank with beached boat under moonlight

events.description: bright full moon becomes clearly visible in the night sky

agents.ego_description: walking along the sandy shore approaching the beached wooden boat

entered.detail: bright full moon illuminating the night sky and reflecting on water

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the sandy shore as the moon becomes visible, illuminating the scene. The wooden boat is now close on the right side, and the water reflects the moonlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy shoreline continuing past the beached boat

events.description: character walks past the boat, leaving it behind on the left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sandy shore away from the boat toward distant rocky terrain

entered.detail: rocky terrain and boulders along the shoreline

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the sandy shore, passing the wooden boat which now falls behind on the left. Rocky outcrops appear on the right as the shoreline curves, with the moon still illuminating the path ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense nighttime marsh that gradually opens onto a sandy shoreline. It begins with a hooded character wading through shallow water surrounded by thick vegetation, lily pads, and palm trees under a dark sky with distant cliffs on the horizon. As the character advances, the dense marshland gives way to reed beds while the terrain shifts from water to sand. The scene then expands toward the water's edge, revealing a wooden boat beached on the shore ahead.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a moonlit sandy shore as the character passes a beached vessel and moves toward a rocky coastline. It begins with the character walking forward as the moon emerges to illuminate the scene, casting bright reflections across the nearby water. As the character advances, the wooden boat on the right comes into close view before the camera tracks past it, leaving the vessel behind on the left. The scene then shifts as the shoreline curves, revealing jagged rocky outcrops on the right while the moonlight continues to light the path ahead.
